notableEvents.label: Richie Palacios GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Richie Palacios grounds into a double play, second baseman Gleyber Torres to shortstop Zack Short to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Yandy Díaz out at 2nd. Richie Palacios out at 1st.
